_comment: INTERNAL M2 design data — fusion-locked special pools (design baseline §7/§9). Pool CONTENTS are spoilers: the species_id values below must never appear in docs/, README, or the wiki. scripts/check-spoilers.sh greps every species_id in this file against public docs and fails CI on a hit. Publicly documented: only the DNA *types* and riddle-style hints. Not yet wired into the shipped pack (no engine/pack import); ids are reserved, additive-only.

pools.hint: those who watch through the night are watched back…
